description: Installation targets for Sparky across environments. Each target defines what transfers unchanged, what must be wired, what must be configured, and what validation is required.

targets.name: Formula One AI Factory
targets.description: The build environment where Sparky is developed, rated, and prepared for deployment.
environment_variables_required: GITHUB_TOKEN — for GitHub MCP tool access
CONTEXT7_API_KEY — for Context7 documentation retrieval (if authenticated)
validation_notes: Context7 tool: available but connector instability observed
Live adapter layer: index.ts exists; full round-trip not validated
Session state persistence: not validated end-to-end
deployment_blockers: Live adapter layer not fully validated

targets.name: open--claw
targets.description: The downstream AI orchestration environment where Sparky is deployed for production governance operations.
what_transfers_unchanged: All governance logic in agent.ts (aside from environment-specific adapters)
what_must_be_wired: live/index.ts — OpenClaw-facing entrypoint must be configured for open--claw environment
Tool adapters in tools.ts — GitHub, Context7, Firestore adapters must target open--claw environment
Environment variables — must be set in open--claw's environment management
Session state persistence — must be wired to open--claw's storage layer
Decision log persistence — must be wired to open--claw's audit storage
environment_variables_required: GITHUB_TOKEN — for GitHub MCP tool access in open--claw environment
OPENCLAW_SESSION_STORE — open--claw's session state storage connection
OPENCLAW_AUDIT_STORE — open--claw's audit log storage connection
SPARKY_DEPLOYMENT_ENV — set to 'openclaw' to activate production mode
what_cannot_be_assumed: Same GitHub token scope as factory environment
Same file system paths for session state and decision log
Same tool adapter behavior (adapters must be re-tested in open--claw)
Specialist agent availability — specialist registry must be re-validated for open--claw
install_checklist: Clone or deploy Sparky packet to open--claw agent registry
Wire live/index.ts to open--claw's invocation system
Configure session state persistence to open--claw storage
Configure audit log persistence to open--claw storage
Validate tool adapters in open--claw environment
Run minimum 5 governance cycles with observability
Confirm all blockers from factory deployment_blockers are resolved
validation_notes: All open--claw integration paths are theoretical until installation is performed
Do not treat any open--claw path as validated
deployment_blockers: Factory deployment blockers must be resolved first
open--claw installation has not been performed
Session state persistence adapter not built
Audit log persistence adapter not built
Specialist registry for open--claw environment not defined

environment_specific: Tool adapter implementations in tools.ts (endpoint and auth per environment)
Session state and audit log persistence paths
Specialist registry (available specialists differ per environment)
